criteria.1: Depict exactly two parallel metal plates, both visible and stationary throughout the video.
criteria.2: Display a single, clearly visible arrow indicating electron flow, oriented from one plate to the other, present only when electron flow occurs.
criteria.3: Show a visible electric field confined strictly between the plates, represented by field lines or a clear indicator, with no extension outside the plates.
criteria.4: Render a faint glow only in the region between the plates and only when electron flow is indicated.
criteria.5: Maintain correct spatial separation and alignment of all elements, with no overlap or misplacement at any time.

criteria.1: Initiate the arrow and faint glow simultaneously at the onset of electron flow.
criteria.2: Terminate the arrow and faint glow simultaneously at the cessation of electron flow.
criteria.3: Prevent the faint glow from appearing before or persisting after the arrow at any point.
criteria.4: Synchronize the appearance and disappearance of the electric field visualization with the arrow and faint glow.

criteria.1: Represent the electric field between the plates as uniform, with parallel, evenly spaced field lines.
criteria.2: Orient the arrow to indicate electron flow from the negative to the positive plate, consistent with physics conventions.
criteria.3: Confine all field lines and the faint glow strictly to the space between the plates, with no extension outside.
criteria.4: Depict the faint glow only when and where electron flow is present.
criteria.5: Avoid any depiction of field lines or electrons curving, diverging, or behaving inconsistently with the field between parallel plates.

criteria.1: Visually link the onset of electron flow to the immediate appearance of both the electric field and faint glow between the plates.
criteria.2: Demonstrate that stopping electron flow causes both the electric field and faint glow to disappear immediately.
criteria.3: Restrict the electric field and faint glow to the region between the plates, with no presence elsewhere.
criteria.4: Exclude any visual elements that could suggest alternative causes for the electric field or glow.

criteria.1: Maintain the same appearance, size, and orientation of the metal plates throughout the video.
criteria.2: Keep the direction and style of the arrow indicating electron flow unchanged whenever present.
criteria.3: Ensure the electric field visualization remains consistent in style, density, and direction during its presence.
criteria.4: Keep the faint glow's intensity and color constant whenever present, with no arbitrary fluctuations.

criteria.1: Exclude any depiction of electrons, particles, or field lines outside the region between the plates.
criteria.2: Avoid any visual cues such as sparks, flashes, or glows outside the intended area.
criteria.3: Omit any additional arrows or indicators that could confuse the direction or nature of electron flow.
criteria.4: Prevent the appearance of any visual elements that could be interpreted as electric or magnetic fields outside the region between the plates.
